FR-01.title: Patient Registration
requirements: Register with personal details and insurance info
Verify identity via email and phone
Upload ID documents for verification
Accept terms and privacy policy
acceptance_criteria: Verification emails and SMS are sent
Documents are uploaded and stored securely
Terms acceptance is recorded with timestamp

FR-02.title: Appointment Booking
requirements: View available time slots for each doctor
Book appointments by selecting doctor, date, and time
Confirmation email and SMS sent after booking
Cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours before

FR-03.title: Medical Records Access
requirements: View complete medical history
Records include diagnoses, treatments, lab results
Records in reverse chronological order
Download records as PDF
acceptance_criteria: Lab results show normal range indicators
PDF download is complete and formatted

FR-04.title: Prescription Management
requirements: View current active prescriptions
Request refills for eligible prescriptions
Doctor approves refill requests
Track refill history

FR-05.title: Secure Messaging
requirements: Send messages to assigned doctors
Support text and file attachments up to 5MB
All messages encrypted in transit and at rest
Doctors can reply from their dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Messages are delivered to recipient inbox
Both parties receive notification for new messages

FR-06.title: Lab Results Viewing
requirements: View lab test results with reference ranges
Results flagged if outside normal range
Historical trend charts for repeated tests
Share results with other providers
acceptance_criteria: Results display with correct values and ranges
Abnormal values are highlighted in red
Trend chart shows values over time
Sharing generates secure link with expiry

FR-07.title: Billing and Payments
requirements: View outstanding invoices and payment history
Pay bills online via credit card or bank transfer
Download itemized billing statements
Set up payment plans for large bills
acceptance_criteria: Invoice list shows correct amounts and dates
Payment plan splits total into installments

FR-08.title: Appointment Reminders
requirements: Send reminder 24 hours before appointment
Send reminder 1 hour before appointment
Reminders via email and SMS
Include appointment details and location
acceptance_criteria: Both email and SMS are received
Reminder contains correct date, time, doctor, and location

FR-09.title: Insurance Verification
requirements: Patients can add insurance provider details
System verifies insurance eligibility
Display coverage and copay information
Update insurance information as needed

FR-10.title: Emergency Contact Management
requirements: Add emergency contacts with name, phone, and relationship
Multiple emergency contacts allowed
Contacts accessible by medical staff in emergencies
Contacts can be updated or removed
acceptance_criteria: Multiple contacts are stored and displayed
Staff can access contacts when authorized

FR-01.title: Build Patient Registration API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/patients/register. Accept personal details, insurance info. Send verification email and SMS. Handle document upload for ID verification. Store with HIPAA-compliant encryption.

FR-01.title: Build Registration Form
FR-01.description: Create multi-step registration: Step 1 personal info, Step 2 insurance details, Step 3 ID document upload, Step 4 terms acceptance. Field validation at each step. Progress indicator.

FR-01.title: Create Patient Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design patients table: id, name, dob, email, phone, insurance_provider, insurance_id, id_document_url, verified, terms_accepted_at, created_at. Encrypt PII fields at rest.

FR-02.title: Build Appointment Booking API
FR-02.description: Create GET /api/doctors/:id/availability (available slots), POST /api/appointments (book), PATCH /api/appointments/:id (reschedule), DELETE /api/appointments/:id (cancel, enforce 24h rule). Send notifications.

FR-02.title: Build Booking Interface
FR-02.description: Create appointment booking flow: select doctor from list, view calendar with available slots, select date/time, confirm booking. Show confirmation with appointment details.

FR-03.title: Build Medical Records API
FR-03.description: Create GET /api/patients/:id/records (paginated, reverse chronological). Support filters by type (diagnosis/lab/treatment). GET /api/records/:id/pdf for download. Log all access for HIPAA audit.

FR-03.title: Build Records Viewer
FR-03.description: Create medical records page with timeline view showing record type icons, dates, and summaries. Detail view with full record data. PDF download button. Filter by record type.

FR-04.title: Build Prescription API
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/patients/:id/prescriptions (active list), POST /api/prescriptions/:id/refill (request refill), PATCH /api/prescriptions/:id/refill/:refillId (doctor approve/deny). Track refill history.

FR-04.title: Build Prescription Screen
FR-04.description: Create prescriptions page with active medication cards showing name, dosage, frequency, refills remaining. Request Refill button. Refill history tab with status for each request.

FR-05.title: Build Secure Messaging API
FR-05.description: Create messaging endpoints with end-to-end encryption (AES-256). POST /api/messages (send), GET /api/conversations (list), GET /api/conversations/:id (messages). Support file attachments up to 5MB.

FR-05.title: Build Messaging Interface
FR-05.description: Create HIPAA-compliant chat interface with conversation list, message thread view, text input with attachment button, and encryption indicator. Auto-logout after inactivity timeout.

FR-06.title: Build Lab Results API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/patients/:id/labs (results with reference ranges). Flag abnormal values. GET /api/labs/:testType/trends for historical data. POST /api/labs/:id/share (generate secure link).

FR-06.title: Build Lab Results Viewer
FR-06.description: Create lab results page with results table (value, range, status indicator). Trend charts using line graphs for repeated tests over time. Share button generating expiring link.

FR-07.title: Build Billing API
FR-07.description: Create GET /api/billing/invoices (outstanding and paid), POST /api/billing/pay (process payment), GET /api/billing/:id/statement (PDF), POST /api/billing/:id/payment-plan (create installments).

FR-07.title: Build Billing Page
FR-07.description: Create billing page with outstanding invoices list, payment form with card/bank options, payment history table, statement download, and payment plan setup wizard.

FR-08.title: Build Reminder Service
FR-08.description: Create scheduled job that sends appointment reminders at 24h and 1h before. Send via email and SMS using notification service. Include appointment details, doctor name, and location map link.

FR-08.title: Write Reminder Tests
FR-08.description: Test 24-hour reminder is scheduled correctly. Test 1-hour reminder is scheduled. Test cancelled appointments don't trigger reminders. Test reminder content includes all details.

FR-09.title: Build Insurance API
FR-09.description: Create POST /api/patients/:id/insurance (add/update provider details), GET /api/insurance/verify (check eligibility with provider API), GET /api/insurance/coverage (display plan details and copay).

FR-09.title: Build Insurance Management Screen
FR-09.description: Create insurance section in profile with provider selection dropdown, policy number input, verification status indicator, and coverage details display showing copay and deductible.

FR-10.title: Build Emergency Contacts API
FR-10.description: Create CRUD endpoints for emergency contacts: POST, GET, PATCH, DELETE /api/patients/:id/emergency-contacts. Support multiple contacts. Authorized staff access endpoint.

FR-10.title: Build Emergency Contacts Screen
FR-10.description: Create emergency contacts section with contact cards showing name, phone, relationship. Add/edit form. Delete with confirmation. Maximum 5 contacts.
